# familio_settlement (Data Source)

Look up a single familio.org settlement (place) by UUID — the same UUID that familio_person's birth/death/christening places and familio_source speak. Returns the canonical name, administrative requisites («реквизиты»), classification and coordinates, so configs can resolve or validate a settlement reference.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a settlement (place) by UUID — the same UUID that a person's
# birth/death/christening place and familio_source reference.
data "familio_settlement" "birthplace" {
  uuid = "40d1b180-b739-4ecb-9ee5-ced6fefcd0d8"
}

# Resolve a UUID to a human-readable place, e.g. to document or label a config.
output "birthplace_name" {
  # -> "Нижняя Верея, город Выкса, Нижегородская область"
  value = join(", ", compact([
    data.familio_settlement.birthplace.name,
    data.familio_settlement.birthplace.district,
    data.familio_settlement.birthplace.region,
  ]))
}

output "birthplace_coords" {
  value = {
    lat = data.familio_settlement.birthplace.latitude
    lon = data.familio_settlement.birthplace.longitude
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The familio.org settlement UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `additional_names` (List of String) Alternate/historical names, if any.
- `as_of_year` (Number) Year the main administrative requisite is stated as of.
- `district` (String) Level-2 administrative unit of the main requisite (district/city), e.g. «город Выкса».
- `latitude` (Number) Latitude of the settlement (decimal degrees).
- `longitude` (Number) Longitude of the settlement (decimal degrees).
- `name` (String) Canonical (primary) settlement name.
- `region` (String) Level-1 administrative unit of the main requisite (region/oblast), e.g. «Нижегородская область».
- `status` (String) Settlement status, e.g. «жилой» (inhabited).
- `type` (String) Settlement kind, e.g. «село», «город», «деревня».
